name: The Little Moon
short_description: THE LITTLE MOON: Sail around space, catch fish, meet interesting people.
detailed_description:
The Little Moon is a 2D adventure game travelling through universe.

Sometimes you are landing on a planet and search it, or fly away with 360° angle

A lot of puzzles, and mysteries, things that are hard to understand, Interactions with people, storytelling, sail around beautiful universe. Find interesting stories.

Genre: Side-scrolling adventure, shooter, story telling game.

Features:

A little boy and a girl are living in the little moon.

a lonely tree, a rundown house, everything looks strange.

a book called 'The Wisdom' has fallen into the moon,

and it tells you that there are many things you don't know

but you have to accept them.

The world is full of things you don't understand.

are you ready to accept them?

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Bangla, Hindi
